description: Creates a system that represents a logical grouping of services.

SystemArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the system.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

SystemId.markdownDescription:
The system ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^\S{1,255}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the system.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_\-]{1,59}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the system.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 500  
Update requires: No interruption

Tags.markdownDescription:
Tags assigned to the system.

---

Required: No  
Type: Array  
Update requires: No interruption

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the system was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the system was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the system was last updated.
UpdatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the system was last updated.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

KmsKeyId.description: The KMS key ID for encrypting system data.
KmsKeyId.markdownDescription:
The KMS key ID for encrypting system data.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Pattern: ^((arn:aws(-[^:]+)?:kms:[a-zA-Z0-9-]*:[0-9]{12}:((key/[a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+)))|([a-zA-Z0-9-]{36})|(alias/[a-zA-Z0-9-_/]+))$  
Update requires: Replacement

SharingEnabled.description: Whether the system is enabled to be shared with other members of the Organization. Only applicable if the system owner is a management account or delegated admin.
SharingEnabled.markdownDescription:
Whether the system is enabled to be shared with other members of the Organization. Only applicable if the system owner is a management account or delegated admin.

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption

Key.markdownDescription:
The tag key.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 128  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The tag value.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption

Tag.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

SystemArn.markdownDescription:
The ARN of the system.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^arn:(aws|aws-cn|aws-iso|aws-iso-[a-z]{1}|aws-us-gov):[A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9_/.-]{0,62}:([a-z]{2}-((iso[a-z]{0,1}-)|(gov-)){0,1}[a-z]+-[0-9]):[0-9]{12}:[A-Za-z0-9/][A-Za-z0-9:_/+.-]{0,1023}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

SystemId.markdownDescription:
The system ID.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^\S{1,255}$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the system was created.
CreatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the system was created.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the system was last updated.
UpdatedAt.markdownDescription:
The timestamp when the system was last updated.
